name: Familiar-Possessed - Dharc
effectText: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Dharc the Dark Charmer" you control and 1 face-up DARK monster you control to the GY. When Summoned this way: You can add 1 Level 3 or 4 LIGHT Spellcaster monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card Special Summoned by its own effect attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
